strings.TRAIT_F_CONFIDENT_DESC: High self-efficacy and willingness to step forward; strong in leadership and persuasion.
strings.TRAIT_F_CONVENTIONAL_DESC: Prefers proven methods and convention; strong in routine work but less likely to attempt radical innovation.
strings.TRAIT_F_CORRUPT_DESC: Feels little hesitation about bribes, embezzlement, or exploiting others if it is unlikely to be punished.
strings.TRAIT_F_CREATIVE_DESC: Generates novel solutions and improvises well in tactics and invention; heavy constraints can increase stress.
strings.TRAIT_F_CURIOUS_DESC: Seeks new information and experimentation; boosts exploration and research and supports knowledge-driven progress.
strings.TRAIT_F_CURSE_BEARER_DESC: Misfortune chain: break free or fall deeper. Narrative crossroads.
strings.TRAIT_F_DEATHLESS_NAME_DESC: Posthumous memory. Descendant reputation legacy, cultural imprint.
strings.TRAIT_F_DECEPTIVE_DESC: Adapts the truth to the situation and may use lying or manipulation as a tool when needed.
strings.TRAIT_F_DEPENDENT_DESC: Prefers support and reassurance over acting alone, sometimes clinging strongly to close bonds.
strings.TRAIT_F_DISORGANIZED_DESC: Weak at prioritizing and organization; improvises under pressure but makes more mistakes.
strings.TRAIT_F_DOOM_BRINGER_DESC: Enemy morale -50%, surrender induction. #1 assassination target.
strings.TRAIT_F_ENDER_OF_LINES_DESC: Fear and awe. Without enemies, turns on allies.
strings.TRAIT_F_ENERGETIC_DESC: High energy and quick to act; increases speed but may raise mistakes due to rushing.
strings.TRAIT_F_FAIR_MINDED_DESC: Tries to keep rules and promises, strongly disliking cheating or unfair privilege.
strings.TRAIT_F_FEARFUL_DESC: Quickly detects danger and tends to avoid it, often choosing retreat when odds look bad.
strings.TRAIT_F_FEARLESS_DESC: Less sensitive to threat and acts boldly, rarely hesitating to explore danger or charge in.
strings.TRAIT_F_FLEXIBLE_DESC: Reduces conflict through compromise; increases negotiation and diplomacy, lowering group friction.
strings.TRAIT_F_FORGIVING_DESC: Doesn't hold grudges long and tries to repair relationships, reducing conflict and stabilizing groups.
strings.TRAIT_F_FRUGAL_DESC: Values practicality over luxury, conserving resources and avoiding showy spending.
strings.TRAIT_F_GENTLE_DESC: Treats others gently rather than forcefully; reduces violent and intimidating behaviors.
strings.TRAIT_F_GOD_TOUCHED_DESC: Miracle events, prophet/priest supreme. Misunderstanding risk.
strings.TRAIT_F_GREEDY_DESC: Craves more reward and resources, easily feeling resentment or envy in loss or sharing situations.
strings.TRAIT_F_GREGARIOUS_DESC: Gains energy from social interaction; builds relationships quickly and boosts group cohesion.
strings.TRAIT_F_HARSH_DESC: Uses intimidation and dominance; may gain short-term compliance but often loses trust.
strings.TRAIT_F_HOT_TEMPERED_DESC: Anger spikes quickly and can turn behavior harsh; increases charging in combat but hurts teamwork and quality.
strings.TRAIT_F_INDUSTRIOUS_DESC: Works steadily without procrastinating; increases output but may recover stress more slowly due to overwork.
strings.TRAIT_F_INSECURE_DESC: Avoids the spotlight and is sensitive to rejection or criticism, increasing stress.
strings.TRAIT_F_LAST_HOPE_DESC: Crisis +40%, morale immortal. Ordinary in peacetime.
strings.TRAIT_F_LAZY_DESC: Feels effort as costly and tends to procrastinate; may have less short-term stress but lower productivity and reliability.
strings.TRAIT_F_MEMORY_KEEPER_DESC: Perfect history preservation. Living memory of civilization.
strings.TRAIT_F_MODEST_DESC: Shares credit rather than boasting, and works without needing constant recognition.
strings.TRAIT_F_NONCONFORMIST_DESC: Prefers experimenting over sticking to norms; can spark innovation but may clash with institutions.
strings.TRAIT_F_ORGANIZED_DESC: Plans and organizes systematically, boosting productivity while reducing errors and chaos stress.
strings.TRAIT_F_PATIENT_DESC: Tolerates frustration well and rarely explodes; strong in long projects and negotiations.
strings.TRAIT_F_PEOPLES_FLAME_DESC: Rebellion leadership supreme, morale +40%. Risk of tyranny upon ascent.
strings.TRAIT_F_PERFECTIONIST_DESC: Raises standards and quality significantly, but slows work and can increase frustration and stress.
strings.TRAIT_F_PRUDENT_DESC: Prioritizes planning over impulse; manages risk and reduces accidents, but may be slow when improvisation is needed.
strings.TRAIT_F_RECKLESS_DESC: Acts impulsively and underestimates risk; increases adventure and charges but raises accidents and large losses.
strings.TRAIT_F_RESERVED_DESC: Moves quietly with muted expression; slower pace but fewer mistakes and less overheating.
strings.TRAIT_F_SELF_IMPORTANT_DESC: Expects special respect and reacts strongly to being ignored or disrespected.
strings.TRAIT_F_SELF_RELIANT_DESC: Strongly prefers solving problems alone and relies less on others even during crises.
strings.TRAIT_F_SENTIMENTAL_DESC: Warm and empathetic; reacts strongly to others' suffering and often chooses caring actions.
strings.TRAIT_F_SHY_DESC: Dislikes speaking up or being the center of attention; tends to gravitate toward solo tasks.
strings.TRAIT_F_SILENT_FOUNDER_DESC: Nameless contributor. Functionally optimal without recognition.
strings.TRAIT_F_SINCERE_DESC: Prefers telling the truth as-is and feels strong aversion to deception or backroom deals.
strings.TRAIT_F_SOLITARY_DESC: Feels comfortable alone and tires in crowds; strong at solo work like research or crafting.
strings.TRAIT_F_STUBBORN_DESC: Hard to sway once decided; can stand firm under pressure but may increase conflict by refusing compromise.
strings.TRAIT_F_TOUGH_MINDED_DESC: Less emotionally shaken and more cool-headed; tends to do less comforting or caretaking.
strings.TRAIT_F_TRADITIONALIST_DESC: Values tradition and norms; supports stability but may adapt slowly to rapid change.
strings.TRAIT_F_TWIN_CROWNED_DESC: Wide-area governance, diplomacy +50%. Both sides rebellion risk.
strings.TRAIT_F_UNCROWNED_KING_DESC: Unofficial influence supreme. Stronger than official leaders.
strings.TRAIT_F_UTILITARIAN_DESC: Prefers efficiency over decoration; makes fast, rational choices but has little interest in creative luxury.
strings.TRAIT_F_VENGEFUL_DESC: Remembers slights and seeks payback; increases conflict, sometimes using intimidation to reduce fear.
strings.TRAIT_F_WORLD_SHAPER_DESC: Invention 5x, triggers era transitions. Enemy of existing order.
strings.TRAIT_L_BEAST_AFFINITY_DESC: Animal training +50%, beast attack -40%. Human social -15%.
strings.TRAIT_L_BLOOD_FURY_DESC: Combat berserk (strength +40%, ally identification -30%). Peacetime anger builds.
strings.TRAIT_L_CURSED_WOMB_DESC: Birth mortality 3x, infertility +40%. Surviving children all abilities +10%.
strings.TRAIT_L_DEEP_ROOTS_DESC: Lifespan +15%, recovery +25%, aging slowdown. Cannot migrate.
strings.TRAIT_L_ECHO_FACE_DESC: Ancestral resemblance. Family +15%, easier family recognition.
strings.TRAIT_L_EMBER_HEART_DESC: Crisis activation (+30%), peacetime lethargy (-15%). Extreme situations only.
strings.TRAIT_L_HAWKS_GAZE_DESC: Vision +40%, hunting and scouting +30%, archery +20%. Close-range precision -15%.
strings.TRAIT_L_IRON_LIVER_DESC: Poison and alcohol resistance +60%, immunity +20%. Taste -10%.
strings.TRAIT_L_MOON_SICKNESS_DESC: Periodic mental instability (emotion swing 2x). Art inspiration +30%.
strings.TRAIT_L_OLD_BLOOD_DESC: Bloodline marker. Same carriers +20 relations, other bloodlines -10.
strings.TRAIT_L_SHORT_WICK_DESC: Lifespan -20%, accelerated aging. Youth: all abilities +15%.
strings.TRAIT_L_SILVER_TONGUE_BLOOD_DESC: Linguistic +20%, persuasion +30%. Cannot endure silence (stress when alone).
strings.TRAIT_L_STARLIT_MIND_DESC: All intelligence +10%, learning +20%. Information overload mental break risk.
strings.TRAIT_L_TWIN_SOULED_DESC: Twin birth 5x. Extreme bond between twins; severe trauma if one dies.
strings.TRAIT_L_WANDERING_MIND_DESC: Focus -30%, task abandonment. Creativity +25%, unexpected discoveries +20%.
strings.TRAIT_L_WAR_SEED_DESC: Combat learning 2x, adrenaline +25%. Peaceful occupation aptitude -20%.
strings.TRAIT_M_ANVILS_ECHO_DESC: Metal quality +3, unique weapon crafting. Cannot acknowledge other smiths.
strings.TRAIT_M_BONE_SETTER_DESC: Treatment +40%, permanent disability recovery (low chance). Pain desensitization.
strings.TRAIT_M_BRIDGE_BUILDER_DESC: Hostile faction mediation, alliance +50%. Neutrality compulsion.
strings.TRAIT_M_DEATH_DEALER_DESC: Critical hit +30%, enemy morale destruction aura. Killing desensitization.
strings.TRAIT_M_DEATH_MIDWIFE_DESC: End-of-life care, autopsy, poison knowledge. Life detachment (emotional dulling).
strings.TRAIT_M_EDGE_WALKER_DESC: Intel+combat fusion, solo +40%, escape +50%. Cannot do teamwork.
strings.TRAIT_M_FIRE_TAMER_DESC: Food/drink top quality, banquet 2x. Criticizes others' cooking.
strings.TRAIT_M_GREEN_THUMB_DESC: Harvest +50%, crop failure resist, new crop discovery. War witness = severe stress.
strings.TRAIT_M_HORSE_WHISPERER_DESC: Mounted combat +40%, taming ~100%. Animal slaughter = severe trauma.
strings.TRAIT_M_LAW_SPEAKER_DESC: Trial +40%, dispute resolution 2x, lawmaking. Refuses authority above law.
strings.TRAIT_M_ROOT_FINDER_DESC: Herbs +50%, poison/antidote knowledge. Despises cultivated crops.
strings.TRAIT_M_SHADOW_STEP_DESC: Infiltration and assassination +50%, detection -60%, intel 2x. Daylight anxiety.
strings.TRAIT_M_SONG_KEEPER_DESC: Oral history preservation, festival 2x, culture spread +40%. Silence anxiety.
strings.TRAIT_M_STONE_SINGER_DESC: Mining +50%, ore vein discovery 2x. Surface discomfort (-10%).
strings.TRAIT_M_THREAD_WEAVER_DESC: Textile top quality, special fabrics possible. Refuses rush orders.
strings.TRAIT_M_TONGUE_OF_AGES_DESC: Diplomacy +50%, can prevent wars. Loses sense of own sincerity.
strings.TRAIT_M_WALL_MAKER_DESC: Building durability 2x, fortress design. Ugly building destruction urge.
strings.TRAIT_M_WORD_CARVER_DESC: Record preservation, histories, literacy reduction. Social -15%.
strings.TRAIT_N_ARCHITECTS_EYE_DESC: Construction quality +2 tiers, fortress design optimal. Dissatisfied with others' work.
strings.TRAIT_N_BEAST_TONGUE_DESC: Animal training +50%, wilderness survival +40%. Human social adaptation -20%.
strings.TRAIT_N_DIM_DESC: Learning -50%, complex skills impossible. Simple labor persistence +20%.
strings.TRAIT_N_FERAL_MIND_DESC: Physical skills +40%, instinctive combat. Language, social, organization extremely difficult.
strings.TRAIT_N_INNER_EYE_DESC: Stress recovery 2x, emotion regulation optimal. Empathy is separate.
strings.TRAIT_N_MUSE_TOUCHED_DESC: Art quality top tier, frequent inspiration. Reality focus -30%.
strings.TRAIT_N_NATURES_CHILD_DESC: Weather prediction, gathering +40%, farming +30%. Unfit for urban life.
strings.TRAIT_N_POLYMATH_DESC: All knowledge skill learning +40%. Expertise ceiling -30% (jack of all trades).
strings.TRAIT_N_SILVER_VOICE_DESC: Persuasion, diplomacy, teaching +50%. Risk of manipulation.
strings.TRAIT_N_WAR_SAVANT_DESC: Combat learning 3x speed, tactics +40%. Restless in peace, violence tendency.
strings.TRAIT_R_CALM_HARBOR_DESC: Crisis anchor. Calms nearby panic, blocks stress spread. Cannot share emotions.
strings.TRAIT_R_DAWN_SINGER_DESC: Inspiration source. Art masterwork 5x, can found culture. Reality adaptation -40%.
strings.TRAIT_R_FIRST_FIRE_DESC: Pure innovator. Invention 3x, genuine discovery. Always treated as heretic.
strings.TRAIT_R_GENTLE_THUNDER_DESC: Benevolent authority. Intimidation +30% AND likability +30% simultaneously.
strings.TRAIT_R_GOLDEN_HEART_DESC: Saint. Unlimited self-sacrifice, nearby happiness +20%, healing 2x. Burnout death risk.
strings.TRAIT_R_HEARTHFIRE_DESC: Community parent. Child growth +30%, cohesion +20%. May exclude outsiders.
strings.TRAIT_R_IRON_PROMISE_DESC: Absolute loyalist. Unconditional obedience to sworn lord, even if tyrant.
strings.TRAIT_R_NORTH_STAR_DESC: Ideal leader. Governance +40%, loyalty +50%. Stress 3x when failing own standards.
strings.TRAIT_R_SEED_KEEPER_DESC: Civilization preserver. Technology preservation 100%, teaching 2x. Preservation first.
strings.TRAIT_R_UNBREAKING_DESC: Indomitable guardian. All abilities +30% in crisis, morale immune. Ordinary in peace.
strings.TRAIT_R_WELLSPRING_DESC: Infinite empathy. Trauma healing +50%. Accumulates others' trauma, mental health risk.
strings.TRAIT_R_WORLD_BRIDGE_DESC: Cultural mediator. Cross-cultural +50%, prejudice immune. Stranger everywhere.
strings.TRAIT_S_ASH_PROPHET_DESC: Cult leader. Religion creation +60%, fanatic followers. Settlement division risk.
strings.TRAIT_S_BROKEN_COMPASS_DESC: Antisocial. Ignores all rules and duties. Crime tendency +50%, wandering.
strings.TRAIT_S_CARRION_COMFORT_DESC: Complete apathy. Doesn't care about self or others. Neglect destroys surroundings.
strings.TRAIT_S_COLD_HARVEST_DESC: Systematic exploiter. Emotionless extraction +40%. Causes population decline.
strings.TRAIT_S_CRACKED_MIRROR_DESC: Vulnerable narcissist. Manipulates through pity. Endless need for validation.
strings.TRAIT_S_HOLLOW_CROWN_DESC: Primary psychopath. Zero empathy, zero guilt. Charming predator. Tyrannical but efficient.
strings.TRAIT_S_HONEYED_VENOM_DESC: Con artist. Perfect trust performance. Long-term fraud +60%. Best colleague until caught.
strings.TRAIT_S_IRON_CRADLE_DESC: Cruel perfectionist. Punishes substandard work. Quality +2 but subordinate stress 3x.
strings.TRAIT_S_JEALOUS_FLAME_DESC: Paranoid lover. Partner monopoly. Betrayal detection +50%. Destroys relationships.
strings.TRAIT_S_MIRROR_THRONE_DESC: Grandiose narcissist. Follower recruitment +50%. Rage on criticism. Self-destructs on failure.
strings.TRAIT_S_NIGHT_BLOOM_DESC: Predatory charmer. Seduction +60%. Every meeting is a hunt. Exploits then abandons.
strings.TRAIT_S_PUPPET_MASTER_DESC: Long-term conspiracy +60%, loyal minion recruitment. All relationships are chess pieces.
strings.TRAIT_S_RED_SMILE_DESC: Sadist. Pleasure from pain. Interrogation +60%, personal combat morale +30%. Spreads fear.
strings.TRAIT_S_THRONE_HUNGER_DESC: Tyrant. Power seizure +50%, loyalty enforcement. Always breeds resistance eventually.
strings.TRAIT_S_WEB_WEAVER_DESC: Social parasite. All-faction connections. Information monopoly +50%, provokes conflict.
strings.TRAIT_W_BATTLE_FORGED_DESC: Panic immune, morale +20%, ignores injuries. Hypervigilance in peacetime.
strings.TRAIT_W_BROKEN_FAITH_DESC: Previous faith removed, skepticism. Can found new religion.
strings.TRAIT_W_CHAIN_BREAKER_DESC: Freedom struggle leader, charisma +20%. Distrusts all leaders.
strings.TRAIT_W_CROWN_WEIGHT_DESC: Governance experience +30%, charisma +15%. Loneliness, paranoia, stress.
strings.TRAIT_W_DREAMING_PROPHET_DESC: Prophecy events, follower recruitment. Reality/fantasy distinction blurs.
strings.TRAIT_W_FAMINE_SURVIVOR_DESC: Food hoarding compulsion, food management +30%. Sharing difficulty.
strings.TRAIT_W_KINSLAYER_DESC: Social stigma -50%, fear aura. Revered in some cultures.
strings.TRAIT_W_MOTHERS_FURY_DESC: Combat 2x for endangered children. Loss of reason.
strings.TRAIT_W_OATH_BREAKER_DESC: Trust -30%, freedom +20%. Guilt or liberation depending on personality.
strings.TRAIT_W_OLD_WOLF_DESC: Wisdom +30%, combat experience offsets physical decline. Successor training 2x.
strings.TRAIT_W_PLAGUE_WALKER_DESC: Immune to that disease, medicine +20%. Loneliness resistance.
strings.TRAIT_W_SCARRED_SOUL_DESC: Base stress +20%, fear resistance +30%. Deep relationships difficult, nightmares.
strings.TRAIT_W_TOUCHED_BY_GODS_DESC: Faith maximized, prophet potential. Revered or deemed insane.
strings.TRAIT_W_TWICE_BORN_DESC: Death fear immune, risk-taking +30%. Meaning-seeking urgency surges.
strings.TRAIT_W_WANDERERS_RETURN_DESC: Multicultural knowledge, trade +30%, multilingual. Never fully belongs.
strings.TRAIT_W_WIDOWS_FROST_DESC: Emotional dulling, new relationships -50%. Lonely resilience, comforting others +30%.
strings.TRAIT_Y_ASHES_DAWN_DESC: From worst to best. Era's turning point.
strings.TRAIT_Y_BLEEDING_ROOT_DESC: One with settlement. Settlement destruction = own death.
strings.TRAIT_Y_BLOOD_ARCHITECT_DESC: Civilization built on sacrifice. Human cost ignored.
strings.TRAIT_Y_BURNING_GLASS_DESC: Emotion contagion 3x. Festival king or panic epicenter.
strings.TRAIT_Y_CHAIN_MARCH_DESC: Symbol of liberation. Total rejection of existing order.
strings.TRAIT_Y_CROWN_OF_THORNS_DESC: Throne's agony. Governance +30%, mental accelerated deterioration.
strings.TRAIT_Y_DAWN_OF_WAR_DESC: Born for war. Does not know peace.
strings.TRAIT_Y_DREAM_FORGE_DESC: Imagination made real. Masterwork of masterworks.
strings.TRAIT_Y_EMBER_PROPHET_DESC: Prophecy from suffering. Accuracy extreme, mental critical.
strings.TRAIT_Y_ETERNAL_FLAME_DESC: Perfect leader. Golden age catalyst. No successor possible.
strings.TRAIT_Y_GENTLE_CAGE_DESC: Care becomes control. Creates dependency, burnout.
strings.TRAIT_Y_GOD_KILLER_DESC: Ultimate warrior + worst human. Civilization's catastrophe.
strings.TRAIT_Y_GOLDEN_CHAINS_DESC: Oath + debt. No freedom, absolute trust.
strings.TRAIT_Y_HOLLOW_SAINT_DESC: Perfect saint act. Zero empathy but caring. Undetectable.
strings.TRAIT_Y_HOLY_FIRE_DESC: Merciful zealotry. Conversion maximized, martyrdom risk.
strings.TRAIT_Y_LIVING_MONUMENT_DESC: Massive authority. Physical + principled. Cannot be defied.
strings.TRAIT_Y_MOONS_CRADLE_DESC: Madness + genius fusion. Masterwork and catastrophe alternate.
strings.TRAIT_Y_NIGHT_GARDEN_DESC: Inner world richer than reality. Masterwork max, reality min.
strings.TRAIT_Y_PAIN_WEAVER_DESC: Pain becomes art. Cultural history eternal.
strings.TRAIT_Y_PLAGUE_SAINT_DESC: Survived plague, still cares for others. Medicine +40%.
strings.TRAIT_Y_RED_GARDEN_DESC: Fascinating but lethal. All relationships tragic.
strings.TRAIT_Y_TITANS_MERCY_DESC: Mercy of the strong. Enemy's respect.
strings.TRAIT_Y_UNMOVING_STORM_DESC: Absolute power machine. Inevitably tragic ending.
strings.TRAIT_Y_VELVET_KNIFE_DESC: Perfect double agent. All factions infiltrated.
strings.TRAIT_Y_WOLVES_PACT_DESC: Mutual +35%. If one dies, suicidal charge.
strings.TRAIT_c_ac_hh_reliable_teamworker_DESC: Reliable Teamworker archetype based on A-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ac_hl_kind_dreamer_DESC: Kind Dreamer archetype based on A-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ac_lh_strict_commander_DESC: Strict Commander archetype based on A-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ac_ll_unruly_brute_DESC: Unruly Brute archetype based on A-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_adventurer_DESC: Seeks new lands and knowledge proactively; triggers exploration and settlement events.
strings.TRAIT_c_agitator_DESC: Moves crowds to amplify conflict or accelerate change; may trigger revolution or riot events.
strings.TRAIT_c_animal_tamer_DESC: Strong with animals; benefits civilizations that leverage animals for transport, combat, or production.
strings.TRAIT_c_ao_hh_open-minded_humanitarian_D: Open‑Minded Humanitarian archetype based on A-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ao_hl_benevolent_traditionalist_: Benevolent Traditionalist archetype based on A-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ao_lh_cynical_heretic_DESC: Cynical Heretic archetype based on A-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ao_ll_rigid_oppressor_DESC: Rigid Oppressor archetype based on A-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_architect_master_DESC: Builds with both structure and aesthetics; can improve defense, productivity, and beauty satisfaction.
strings.TRAIT_c_artist_DESC: Strong emotion and expression drive; boosts cultural and social events but may be fragile in crises.
strings.TRAIT_c_ascetic_DESC: Values discipline and restraint, avoiding indulgence; strong in resource management and survival through crises.
strings.TRAIT_c_assassin_instinct_DESC: Prefers covert elimination over open confrontation; promotes political assassination and sabotage events.
strings.TRAIT_c_assault_captain_DESC: Enjoys leading charges and pushing the unit forward; big morale gain on victory, big losses on defeat.
strings.TRAIT_c_backroom_broker_DESC: Profits from illicit trade and brokering; becomes dramatic in systems with contraband, sanctions, or policing.
strings.TRAIT_c_berserker_DESC: Very low fear with extremely high aggression; charges and pursues often but is hard to control and may suffer heavy losses.
strings.TRAIT_c_born_leader_DESC: Gathers and organizes people while staying calm under pressure; strongly prefers leadership roles.
strings.TRAIT_c_born_merchant_DESC: Expands trade through negotiation and relationship-building; can create long-term trust networks if fair.
strings.TRAIT_c_builder_foreman_DESC: Assigns people and manages workflow; shortens completion time for large construction projects.
strings.TRAIT_c_caregiver_DESC: Naturally drawn to nurturing and healing; strong benefits for population stability and family-centered societies.
strings.TRAIT_c_chef_DESC: Improves food quality and satisfaction; strong in morale recovery, bonding, and festival events.
strings.TRAIT_c_co_hh_methodical_inventor_DESC: Methodical Inventor archetype based on C-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_co_hl_conservative_manager_DESC: Conservative Manager archetype based on C-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_co_lh_free_spirit_DESC: Free Spirit archetype based on C-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_co_ll_careless_waster_DESC: Careless Waster archetype based on C-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_cold_dictator_DESC: Cold and aggressive even under pressure; strong in wartime leadership but worsens peacetime conflict.
strings.TRAIT_c_collector_DESC: Collects and organizes valuable items; can support culture, museums, and research stockpiles.
strings.TRAIT_c_counselor_DESC: Reads emotions and counsels others; reduces mental breaks and speeds up relationship repair.
strings.TRAIT_c_defender_DESC: Strong at defense, cover, and retreat timing rather than reckless charges; reduces losses and improves long fights.
strings.TRAIT_c_democratic_leader_DESC: Leads through trust and consensus; increases cooperation events and reduces revolt risk.
strings.TRAIT_c_diplomat_DESC: Resolves disputes through negotiation and forms alliances; supports war avoidance, trade expansion, and federation building.
strings.TRAIT_c_ea_hh_compassionate_reconciler_D: Compassionate Reconciler archetype based on E-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ea_hl_timid_helper_DESC: Timid Helper archetype based on E-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ea_lh_volatile_bully_DESC: Volatile Bully archetype based on E-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ea_ll_callous_abuser_DESC: Callous Abuser archetype based on E-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ec_hh_anxious_planner_DESC: Anxious Planner archetype based on E-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ec_hl_anxious_drifter_DESC: Anxious Drifter archetype based on E-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ec_lh_cool_strategist_DESC: Cool Strategist archetype based on E-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ec_ll_reckless_drifter_DESC: Reckless Drifter archetype based on E-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_encyclopedia_DESC: Accumulates and transfers broad knowledge, increasing education and technology diffusion speed.
strings.TRAIT_c_engineer_DESC: Enjoys design and problem-solving; becomes core staff for maintenance, invention, and improvement.
strings.TRAIT_c_eo_hh_sensitive_artist_DESC: Sensitive Artist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_eo_hl_anxious_traditionalist_DES: Anxious Traditionalist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_eo_lh_cold_experimenter_DESC: Cold Experimenter archetype based on E-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_eo_ll_unfeeling_realist_DESC: Unfeeling Realist archetype based on E-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ex_hh_emotional_socialite_DESC: Emotional Socialite archetype based on E-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ex_hl_timid_recluse_DESC: Timid Recluse archetype based on E-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ex_lh_daredevil_DESC: Daredevil archetype based on E-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ex_ll_stoic_loner_DESC: Stoic Loner archetype based on E-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_free_spirit_extro_DESC: Values experience over rules and moves impulsively; increases creative events but also operational mistakes.
strings.TRAIT_c_gossip_DESC: Spreads information quickly; energizes social networks but can also accelerate distrust and factionalism.
strings.TRAIT_c_ha_hh_kind-hearted_honest_DESC: Kind‑Hearted Honest archetype based on H-A axis combination.

strings.TRAIT_c_healer_DESC: Increases healing and care actions; strongly improves recovery after plagues and wars.
strings.TRAIT_c_heretic_DESC: Challenges established doctrine and institutions; accelerates innovation but may trigger persecution and conflict.
strings.TRAIT_c_hermit_sage_DESC: Avoids crowds but dives deep into scholarship and technology, accelerating research progression.
strings.TRAIT_c_ho_hh_idealistic_innovator_DESC: Idealistic Innovator archetype based on H-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ho_hl_traditional_moralist_DESC: Traditional Moralist archetype based on H-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ho_lh_cunning_inventor_DESC: Cunning Inventor archetype based on H-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_ho_ll_corrupt_traditionalist_DES: Corrupt Traditionalist archetype based on H-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_hx_hh_honest_leader_DESC: Honest Leader archetype based on H-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_hx_hl_honest_recluse_DESC: Honest Recluse archetype based on H-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_hx_lh_charismatic_con_artist_DES: Charismatic Con Artist archetype based on H-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_hx_ll_sly_loner_DESC: Sly Loner archetype based on H-X axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_inventor_DESC: Creates new tools and methods; acts as a catalyst for technological era transitions.
strings.TRAIT_c_labor_hero_DESC: Drives production upward; however, burnout risk is high and rest events become important.
strings.TRAIT_c_master_craftsman_DESC: A reclusive expert focused on high-quality crafting; greatly increases quality while reducing social activity.
strings.TRAIT_c_mediator_king_DESC: Uses authority to mediate conflict and govern fairly; very strong for domestic stability and alliance maintenance.
strings.TRAIT_c_mercenary_DESC: Fights for pay and status; becomes a strong narrative driver in systems with contracts, wages, and loot.
strings.TRAIT_c_miser_DESC: Overly conserves resources and avoids communal investment; may miss long-term growth opportunities.
strings.TRAIT_c_mystic_DESC: Values symbols and ritual over rational proof; strong influence in systems with religion or magic/ritual.
strings.TRAIT_c_nomad_DESC: Prefers movement over settling; strong for early exploration and route discovery but weak at stable production.
strings.TRAIT_c_pacifist_DESC: Strongly avoids violence, favoring negotiation and support; suffers high stress during warfare.
strings.TRAIT_c_peacekeeper_DESC: Tries to enforce rules fairly; strong at crime suppression and dispute mediation.
strings.TRAIT_c_philanthropist_DESC: Uses resources for the common good; strongly increases charity and relief actions during crises.
strings.TRAIT_c_polymath_DESC: High learning speed and adaptability; boosts research, crafting, and leadership across domains.
strings.TRAIT_c_pragmatist_DESC: Values results over ideology; makes quick decisions in crises but may slow radical innovation.
strings.TRAIT_c_reconciler_DESC: Mediates conflicts and repairs relationships quickly, greatly reducing intra-group disputes.
strings.TRAIT_c_revolutionary_DESC: Preaches change and disrupts the status quo; can boost innovation while raising conflict.
strings.TRAIT_c_saint_DESC: High honesty, agreeableness, and conscientiousness. Greatly increases trust and stability in a community.
strings.TRAIT_c_saintess_DESC: High empathy and moral concern; strongly increases caretaking, healing, and charitable behavior.
strings.TRAIT_c_scholar_scribe_DESC: Accumulates knowledge and records; becomes key staff in writing, administration, and science stages.
strings.TRAIT_c_scientist_DESC: Research-driven and detail-oriented; accelerates technological advancement.
strings.TRAIT_c_scout_DESC: Continues exploring while managing danger; strong in map-making, resource discovery, and first-contact events.
strings.TRAIT_c_settler_DESC: Prefers settlement and infrastructure; greatly increases stability and production in agriculture/urbanization stages.
strings.TRAIT_c_skeptic_DESC: Prioritizes verification and logic; resists superstition and propaganda, supporting knowledge-driven progress.
strings.TRAIT_c_speculator_DESC: Takes calculated risks for big profit; gains influence as economic volatility rises.
strings.TRAIT_c_spendthrift_DESC: Increases immediate gratification and flashy spending; uplifting in abundance but vulnerable in famine.
strings.TRAIT_c_spymaster_DESC: Excels at intelligence gathering and covert operations; creates asymmetric advantage in diplomacy and war.
strings.TRAIT_c_storyteller_DESC: Boosts group morale via stories and performance; synergizes with festivals, legends, and religious spread events.
strings.TRAIT_c_strategist_DESC: High creativity and planning with potentially weak moral restraint; excels at long-term strategy, espionage, and politics.
strings.TRAIT_c_strategist_general_DESC: A commander combining planning and improvisation; greatly increases combat AI strategic decision quality.
strings.TRAIT_c_strict_commander_DESC: Maintains organization through discipline and punishment; boosts short-term combat power but seeds resentment.
strings.TRAIT_c_survivalist_DESC: Strong at risk preparation and resource management; increases survival in disasters, plagues, and famine.
strings.TRAIT_c_thief_DESC: Skilled at theft and infiltration; creates tension in systems with policing, locks, and surveillance.
strings.TRAIT_c_trickster_DESC: Finds loopholes and bends rules playfully; can improvise clever solutions but may undermine trust.
strings.TRAIT_c_tyrant_DESC: High power and charisma but low empathy and fairness; rules through fear and coercion, increasing revolt risk.
strings.TRAIT_c_visionary_DESC: Future-oriented and persuasive; catalyzes new paths and accelerates tech/culture development events.
strings.TRAIT_c_wallflower_DESC: Kind and empathetic but avoids the spotlight; may carry internal stress while contributing quietly through care.
strings.TRAIT_c_xa_hh_social_peacemaker_DESC: Social Peacemaker archetype based on X-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xa_hl_dominating_agitator_DESC: Dominating Agitator archetype based on X-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xa_lh_quiet_helper_DESC: Quiet Helper archetype based on X-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xa_ll_isolated_brawler_DESC: Isolated Brawler archetype based on X-A axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xc_hh_competent_leader_DESC: Competent Leader archetype based on X-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xc_hl_charming_improviser_DESC: Charming Improviser archetype based on X-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xc_lh_silent_craftsman_DESC: Silent Craftsman archetype based on X-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xc_ll_apathetic_recluse_DESC: Apathetic Recluse archetype based on X-C axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xo_hh_charismatic_visionary_DESC: Charismatic Visionary archetype based on X-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xo_hl_populist_DESC: Populist archetype based on X-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xo_lh_solitary_scholar_DESC: Solitary Scholar archetype based on X-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_xo_ll_wallflower_DESC: Wallflower archetype based on X-O axis combination.
strings.TRAIT_c_zealot_DESC: Binds a group through strict discipline and belief, but may suppress dissent and trigger schism or persecution.
strings.TRAIT_d_backstabber_DESC: Social on the surface but readily betrays allies; gains short-term advantage while accelerating group collapse.
strings.TRAIT_d_bully_DESC: Forces compliance through threat and power; increases fear but can erode long-term loyalty and cooperation.
strings.TRAIT_d_callous_DESC: Low empathy and emotional bonding; does less caretaking and may use others coldly to reach goals.
strings.TRAIT_d_con_artist_DESC: Uses charm and planning to deceive for gain; high persuasion success but poor long-term trust.
strings.TRAIT_d_corrupt_official_DESC: Uses organization and authority for rent-seeking; keeps short-term order while institutionalizing corruption.
strings.TRAIT_d_cult_leader_DESC: Binds a group through charisma and discipline while suppressing dissent and reinforcing personality cult dynamics.
strings.TRAIT_d_histrionic_DESC: Dramatic emotional expression and strong attention-seeking; can attract crowds but may disrupt stable governance.
strings.TRAIT_d_machiavellian_DESC: Maximizes gains via long-term planning and manipulation; orderly on the surface but treats trust as a resource.
strings.TRAIT_d_narcissist_grandiose_DESC: Craves attention and praise with a sense of entitlement; reacts with anger and retaliation when ignored.
strings.TRAIT_d_narcissist_vulnerable_DESC: Appears withdrawn yet craves validation and entitlement; high shame and anxiety can destabilize relationships.
strings.TRAIT_d_opportunist_DESC: Puts immediate gain over rules; quickly pivots, betrays, or takes risky opportunities when they appear.
strings.TRAIT_d_predatory_raider_DESC: Lives through combat and raiding; leads attacks without much fear, but with high cruelty.
strings.TRAIT_d_psychopath_primary_DESC: Low empathy and guilt, low fear. Feels little stress from rule-breaking, increasing exploitation and violence.
strings.TRAIT_d_psychopath_secondary_DESC: Impulsive, antagonistic, and emotionally volatile; more violence and betrayal with weak long-term planning.
strings.TRAIT_d_sadist_DESC: May derive enjoyment from others' pain or use it instrumentally; increases cruelty with weak inhibitions.
strings.TRAIT_f_aesthetic_DESC: Values aesthetic quality, investing in beauty and decoration in building and crafting.
strings.TRAIT_f_anxious_DESC: Frequently anticipates what could go wrong; doubles down on checking and preparation but is vulnerable to stress.
strings.TRAIT_f_apathetic_DESC: Prefers the familiar and has low learning drive; adapts slowly to rapid change.
strings.TRAIT_f_bold_DESC: Approaches strangers and new situations proactively; increases negotiation, persuasion, and adventurous actions.
strings.TRAIT_f_calm_DESC: Keeps composure in unexpected situations and makes steadier decisions under pressure.
strings.TRAIT_f_careless_DESC: Often misses details and quality control; may be faster but makes more errors and accidents.
strings.TRAIT_f_confident_DESC: High self-efficacy and willingness to step forward; strong in leadership and persuasion.
strings.TRAIT_f_conventional_DESC: Prefers proven methods and convention; strong in routine work but less likely to attempt radical innovation.
strings.TRAIT_f_corrupt_DESC: Feels little hesitation about bribes, embezzlement, or exploiting others if it is unlikely to be punished.
strings.TRAIT_f_creative_DESC: Generates novel solutions and improvises well in tactics and invention; heavy constraints can increase stress.
strings.TRAIT_f_curious_DESC: Seeks new information and experimentation; boosts exploration and research and supports knowledge-driven progress.
strings.TRAIT_f_deceptive_DESC: Adapts the truth to the situation and may use lying or manipulation as a tool when needed.
strings.TRAIT_f_dependent_DESC: Prefers support and reassurance over acting alone, sometimes clinging strongly to close bonds.
strings.TRAIT_f_disorganized_DESC: Weak at prioritizing and organization; improvises under pressure but makes more mistakes.
strings.TRAIT_f_energetic_DESC: High energy and quick to act; increases speed but may raise mistakes due to rushing.
strings.TRAIT_f_fair_minded_DESC: Tries to keep rules and promises, strongly disliking cheating or unfair privilege.
strings.TRAIT_f_fearful_DESC: Quickly detects danger and tends to avoid it, often choosing retreat when odds look bad.
strings.TRAIT_f_fearless_DESC: Less sensitive to threat and acts boldly, rarely hesitating to explore danger or charge in.
strings.TRAIT_f_flexible_DESC: Reduces conflict through compromise; increases negotiation and diplomacy, lowering group friction.
strings.TRAIT_f_forgiving_DESC: Doesn't hold grudges long and tries to repair relationships, reducing conflict and stabilizing groups.
strings.TRAIT_f_frugal_DESC: Values practicality over luxury, conserving resources and avoiding showy spending.
strings.TRAIT_f_gentle_DESC: Treats others gently rather than forcefully; reduces violent and intimidating behaviors.
strings.TRAIT_f_greedy_DESC: Craves more reward and resources, easily feeling resentment or envy in loss or sharing situations.
strings.TRAIT_f_gregarious_DESC: Gains energy from social interaction; builds relationships quickly and boosts group cohesion.
strings.TRAIT_f_harsh_DESC: Uses intimidation and dominance; may gain short-term compliance but often loses trust.
strings.TRAIT_f_hot_tempered_DESC: Anger spikes quickly and can turn behavior harsh; increases charging in combat but hurts teamwork and quality.
strings.TRAIT_f_industrious_DESC: Works steadily without procrastinating; increases output but may recover stress more slowly due to overwork.
strings.TRAIT_f_insecure_DESC: Avoids the spotlight and is sensitive to rejection or criticism, increasing stress.
strings.TRAIT_f_lazy_DESC: Feels effort as costly and tends to procrastinate; may have less short-term stress but lower productivity and reliability.
strings.TRAIT_f_modest_DESC: Shares credit rather than boasting, and works without needing constant recognition.
strings.TRAIT_f_nonconformist_DESC: Prefers experimenting over sticking to norms; can spark innovation but may clash with institutions.
strings.TRAIT_f_organized_DESC: Plans and organizes systematically, boosting productivity while reducing errors and chaos stress.
strings.TRAIT_f_patient_DESC: Tolerates frustration well and rarely explodes; strong in long projects and negotiations.
strings.TRAIT_f_perfectionist_DESC: Raises standards and quality significantly, but slows work and can increase frustration and stress.
strings.TRAIT_f_prudent_DESC: Prioritizes planning over impulse; manages risk and reduces accidents, but may be slow when improvisation is needed.
strings.TRAIT_f_reckless_DESC: Acts impulsively and underestimates risk; increases adventure and charges but raises accidents and large losses.
strings.TRAIT_f_reserved_DESC: Moves quietly with muted expression; slower pace but fewer mistakes and less overheating.
strings.TRAIT_f_self_important_DESC: Expects special respect and reacts strongly to being ignored or disrespected.
strings.TRAIT_f_self_reliant_DESC: Strongly prefers solving problems alone and relies less on others even during crises.
strings.TRAIT_f_sentimental_DESC: Warm and empathetic; reacts strongly to others' suffering and often chooses caring actions.
strings.TRAIT_f_shy_DESC: Dislikes speaking up or being the center of attention; tends to gravitate toward solo tasks.
strings.TRAIT_f_sincere_DESC: Prefers telling the truth as-is and feels strong aversion to deception or backroom deals.
strings.TRAIT_f_solitary_DESC: Feels comfortable alone and tires in crowds; strong at solo work like research or crafting.
strings.TRAIT_f_stubborn_DESC: Hard to sway once decided; can stand firm under pressure but may increase conflict by refusing compromise.
strings.TRAIT_f_tough_minded_DESC: Less emotionally shaken and more cool-headed; tends to do less comforting or caretaking.
strings.TRAIT_f_traditionalist_DESC: Values tradition and norms; supports stability but may adapt slowly to rapid change.
strings.TRAIT_f_utilitarian_DESC: Prefers efficiency over decoration; makes fast, rational choices but has little interest in creative luxury.
strings.TRAIT_f_vengeful_DESC: Remembers slights and seeks payback; increases conflict, sometimes using intimidation to reduce fear.

strings.VIOLATION_GUILT_MINOR: {name} felt slightly uncomfortable about what they just did.
strings.VIOLATION_GUILT_MODERATE: {name} is feeling guilty about their actions.
strings.VIOLATION_GUILT_SEVERE: {name} is overwhelmed with guilt over what they did.
strings.VIOLATION_INTRUSIVE_THOUGHT: A sudden memory from the past forced itself into {name}'s mind.
strings.VIOLATION_PTG_CREATIVE: {name} has begun channeling their pain into creative work.
strings.VIOLATION_PTG_CURIOUS: {name}'s suffering has led them to ask deeper questions.
strings.VIOLATION_PTG_FORGIVING: {name} has learned to forgive themselves through hardship.
strings.VIOLATION_WITNESS_SHAME: {name} felt shame for acting that way in front of {witness}.
